prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Ford 429 Super Cobra Jet (429SCJ, engine code: 429-8V)** with forged internals including **Manley forged pistons (9.5:1 compression)**, **Crower forged crankshaft (4.300" stroke)**, and **Scat H-beam connecting rods**. Pair with a **Holley Dominator 1150 CFM carburetor** on an **Edelbrock Victor 429 intake manifold** for maximum airflow.

Forced induction via **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbocharger** (62mm inducer, 84mm exducer) with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **Turbonetics Race Series intercooler (24" x 12" x 3.5")**. Custom **stainless steel turbo manifold** by **Burns Stainless** to fit the 429SCJ’s exhaust ports.

Suspension overhaul with **Detroit Speed QUADRALink rear suspension** (4-link setup with adjustable coilovers) and **Global West tubular front A-arms** paired with **QA1 double-adjustable shocks (DR102-201)**. Front sway bar upgraded to **Addco 1.25" diameter** and rear sway bar to **Hellwig 1.125" diameter** for balanced handling.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit** (Torino-specific) with **custom carbon fiber fenders (3.5" flares)**, **ducktail spoiler**, and **front splitter** for aggressive stance. Painted in **PPG Vibrance Collection "Lime Squeeze"** with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap accents** on the hood and roof.

Custom **Billet Specialties Teardrop side mirrors** and **DSE sequential LED taillights** (retrofitted from a 1969 Mustang with Torino-specific housings). Front grille replaced with a **custom billet aluminum mesh grille** by **TMI Products** with a **Ford Racing cobra emblem** in **brushed aluminum**.

Interior overhaul with **Recaro SRD full-bucket seats** (retrimmed in **Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts**), **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede)**, and **Rollcage Engineering 8-point chromoly roll cage** (bolt-in, powder-coated **Gloss Black**). Shift knob replaced with a **Hurst Blackjack 4-speed shifter** (for manual conversions) or **B&M Hammer shifter** (for automatic builds).
